chapters.title: This chart can be used to see their birth, their experiences, and your karma
chapters.content_preview: 3. This chart can be used to see their birth, their experiences, and your karma with them.  Dividing a sign of 30 degrees by 3 results in three segments of 10 degrees apiece. If a planet or the degree of the lagna falls within the first 10 degrees of a sign, it stays in that sign

chapters.title: For younger siblings, the method is to see the 3™ house of this chart as
chapters.content_preview: 3. For younger siblings, the method is to see the 3™ house of this chart as representing the sibling next youngest in age, the 5" house as representing the next sibling (because it is the 3" from the 3) and the 7" house the next (because it is the 3™ from the 5%). chapters.content_preview: 7. This will be particularly so if the planet is also strong by virtue of being exalted, vargottama, in its own sign, or having directional strength. chapters.content_preview: 8. chapters.title: Planets falling in dussthana houses (3, 6, 8, 12) in a divisional chart
chapters.content_preview: 9. Planets falling in dussthana houses (3, 6, 8, 12) in a divisional chart may not give their best results during their dashas in matters pertaining to that division. However, in my experience they can give much better results if they are in a good condition like exaltation, varg

chapters.title: The effects of a planet in a divisional chart get modified based on its
chapters.content_preview: 10. The effects of a planet in a divisional chart get modified based on its conjunction and aspect with other planets. chapters.title: When analyzing any divisional chart, see especially the lagna, lagna
chapters.content_preview: 11. When analyzing any divisional chart, see especially the lagna, lagna lord, and then the house/house lord particularly pertaining to that division.
